title: Delizie Di Calabria Pesto Calabrese 180 gr.
description: Is an artisanal Italian condiment that elegantly captures the sun-drenched spirit of Calabria in a jar: a bold, rustic blending of sun-dried tomatoes, sweet Tropea onion, tangy Pecorino and smoked sheep's ricotta, toasted nuts and a hint of capers and spices in rich extra-virgin olive oil, resulting in a vibrant, creamy pesto that lends depth and Mediterranean warmth to pasta, bruschetta, grilled vegetables or meats while celebrating the rich culinary heritage of Southern Italy.
